main_problems: Missed calls during dinner rush (5pm–8pm) — staff can't answer and calls go to voicemail with no follow-up
Catering and private event inquiries fall through — no structured follow-up sequence after initial contact
No system to collect reviews after a positive dine-in experience
Reservation no-shows — no automated reminder system
All customer interactions rely on staff availability — nothing works after close

recommended_automations.name: Missed Call Text-Back
recommended_automations.description: When a call is missed, an automated SMS is sent within 30 seconds: 'Hi! This is Carmine's Italian Kitchen — sorry we missed you. How can we help? Reply here and we'll get right back to you.'
recommended_automations.estimated_value: Recovers 20–30% of missed calls that would otherwise be lost

recommended_automations.name: Catering Inquiry Follow-Up Sequence
recommended_automations.description: 3-touch SMS + email sequence triggered when a catering inquiry is submitted (via chatbot, web form, or phone). Touch 1: same day confirmation. Touch 2: next morning follow-up with menu PDF. Touch 3: 3-day reminder if no response.

recommended_automations.name: Post-Visit Review Request
recommended_automations.description: 2 hours after a reservation end time, send an SMS: 'Thanks for dining with us at Carmine's tonight! If you enjoyed your meal, we'd love a quick Google review — it means the world to a family-owned restaurant. [LINK]'
recommended_automations.estimated_value: 4–8 new reviews per month on autopilot

recommended_automations.name: Reservation Reminders
recommended_automations.description: Automated SMS reminders sent 24 hours before and 2 hours before a reservation. Reduces no-shows by confirming intent and giving guests an easy way to cancel or reschedule.
recommended_automations.estimated_value: Reduces no-shows by 30–40%, freeing up tables for walk-ins

recommended_automations.name: New Lead → CRM Sync
recommended_automations.description: Every chatbot, web form, or missed call lead is automatically logged to a Google Sheet (or HubSpot Free) with name, phone, email, source, and timestamp. Owner gets a daily digest email at 8am.
recommended_automations.estimated_value: Full visibility into lead pipeline — no more sticky notes or lost contacts

implementation_timeline: 5–7 business days to build and test
